base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_transform_galaxian — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1981 galaga. Challenging-stage variant — Galaxian-ship throwback form. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
